2606.09293.title: One Model, Multiple Goals: Adaptive Multi-Objective Learning for E-commerce Dialogue Systems
2606.09293.paper_summary: Dialogue systems in e-commerce scenarios often need to satisfy multiple objectives: accurately reasoning over user profiles (e.g., eligibility, credit limit) to ensure correct decision-making and user state interpretation, while also generating natural and faithful responses. These goals are complementary but not identical. In this work, we propose MORE, an adaptive Multi-Objective REinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes reasoning accuracy and linguistic naturalness. Our preliminary experiments show that directly mixing rewards with diverging optimization dynamics can cause oscillations and unstable learning. Thus, instead of optimizing a single mixed reward, we treat reasoning functions as constraints that guide policy optimization. At inference time, the system directly generates responses without explicit reasoning steps, while still benefiting from reasoning-enhanced scaffold and avoiding additional inference overhead. To better balance linguistic objectives during response generation, we introduce an adaptive multi-reward mechanism that aggregates signals such as fluency and naturalness and dynamically reweighs them via gradient feedback. We evaluate MORE on two real-world dialogue systems at ByteDance and the MultiWOZ 2.2 benchmark, where it consistently outperforms strong baselines. In 14-day online experiments on ByteDance production traffic, MORE improves overall and reached conversion by 16.53% and 30.09%, while increasing user satisfaction and reducing handoff rates. Notably, in a human-machine comparison, MORE recovers about 60% of the incremental conversion lift achieved by human agents.
2606.09293.paper_summary_zh: 電子商務場景中的對話系統通常需要滿足多個目標：準確推理用戶檔案（例如，資格、信用額度）以確保正確的決策和用戶狀態解釋，同時生成自然且真實的回應。這些目標是互補的，但並不相同。在本研究中，我們提出了MORE，一個自適應的多目標強化學習框架，旨在共同優化推理準確性和語言自然性。我們的初步實驗顯示，直接混合獎勵與不同的優化動態可能導致振盪和不穩定的學習。因此，我們不再優化單一的混合獎勵，而是將推理函數視為指導策略優化的約束。在推理時，系統直接生成回應，而不需要明確的推理步驟，同時仍然受益於增強推理的支架，並避免額外的推理開銷。為了在回應生成過程中更好地平衡語言目標，我們引入了一種自適應多重獎勵機制，該機制聚合流暢性和自然性等信號，並通過梯度反饋動態重新加權。我們在字節跳動的兩個真實對話系統和MultiWOZ 2.2基準上評估了MORE，結果顯示其始終優於強基準。在對字節跳動生產流量進行的14天在線實驗中，MORE提高了整體和轉換率，分別達到16.53%和30.09%，同時提高了用戶滿意度並降低了交接率。值得注意的是，在人機比較中，MORE恢復了人類代理所達成的約60%的增量轉換提升。
2606.09293.author: Mingzhe Li et.al.
2606.09293.authors: Mingzhe Li, Jing Xiang, Enguo Zhou, Lang Gao, Tai Li, Qishen Zhang, Xiangliang Zhang, Xiuying Chen
